command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Full Remy telegram config ==="
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json')); print(json.dumps(d['channels']['telegram'], indent=2))"

echo ""
echo "=== Search docs for 'not-allowed' group auto-reply logic ==="
grep -rn "not-allowed\|groupAllowFrom\|group.*allow\|allowFrom" /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|group|allow" | head -15

echo ""
echo "=== What makes a group 'allowed' in OpenClaw? Find the rule ==="
grep -rn "groupPolicy\|group.*policy\|chatPolicy\|allowGroups\|groups.*enabled" /home/jose/.npm-global/lib/node_modules/openclaw/docs/ 2>/dev/null | head -10
REMOTE
